q: A model the organization of a system or the structure of the data that is processed by the system.
What is System modeling?
opts: a model the dynamic behavior of the system and how it responds to events.
a model the context or environment of the system
is the process of developing abstract models of a system, with each model presenting a different view or perspective of that system.
a: is the process of developing abstract models of a system, with each model presenting a different view or perspective of that system.

q: These are established to define what is inside and what is outside the system.

It shows the system hardware and how software components are distributed across the processors in the system.
Means that analysis of whether the system can meet its non-functional requirements is possible.
Data-centred applications that process user requests and update information in a system database.
What is Context Models?
opts: they show what lies outside the system boundaries.
Models should be an accurate representation of the system but need not be complete.
Models have to be both correct and complete.
a: they show what lies outside the system boundaries.

q: It helps the analyst to understand the functionality of the system and models are used to communicate with customers.
A model the interactions between a system and its environment, or between the components of a system.
A model the context or environment of the system.
What is Software Architecture?
opts: is concerned with the way that an individual program is decomposed into components.
The design process for identifying the sub-systems making up a system and the framework for sub-system control and communication
a: The design process for identifying the sub-systems making up a system and the framework for sub-system control and communication

q: What is Layered architecture?
opts: Distributed system model which shows how data and processing is distributed across a range of components.
Organises the system into a set of layers (or abstract machines) each of which provide a set of services.
is a stylized description of good design practice, which has been tried and tested in different environments.
a: Organises the system into a set of layers (or abstract machines) each of which provide a set of services.

q: Is concerned with the architecture of complex enterprise systems that include other systems, programs, and program components.
It shows how the software is decomposed for development.
The architecture may be reusable across a range of systems.
This software display the organization of a system in terms of the components that make up that system and their relationships
It simply show the other systems in the environment, not how the system being developed is used in that environment.
What is Sequence diagrams?
opts: use case may be people or other systems.
is part of the UML and are used to model the interactions between the actors and the objects within a system.

a: is part of the UML and are used to model the interactions between the actors and the objects within a system.
